summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas Chatter #14 – SAGE Labs is LIVE! GTs & LPs
RahMega posted a video recapping the last week of Star Atlas news.
SAGE LABS – THE MISSING MANUAL – PART 1
Aephia published an article of a manual for SAGE Labs.
Metaverse Nomads #113 Star Atlas w/ Yield Guild Games
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
Star Atlas: Trade Table Tool
OCG Thor posted a video of a Star Atlas SAGE Labs tool he built.
#11 | What a Roller Coaster of a release SAGE Labs has been | Star Atlas
Pathfinder posted a video about his initial experience in SAGE Labs.
Tips to consider when purchasing ships in Star Atlas
Undisputed Noobs posted a video about tips for purchasing a Star Atlas ship.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #98
Aephia posted their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
STAR ATLAS #200 PLAY SAGE & CELEBRATE WITH ME
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas How To: Create Your Fleets with NANCY
TLDR posted a video summary of creating fleets in NANCY.
How to Play Star Atlas (Sage Labs)
Atlas Theory posted a video on how to play SAGE Labs.
The Atlas Brew #81
Star Atlas TV posted a replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Brew #80: Sage Labs & Community Updates – TLDR
TLDR posted a summary video of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Sage Labs First Week
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about the first week of SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas – ZERO to HERO (Episode 4)
Atlas Theory posted a video in his ZERO to HERO series.
